text: @lennertmets Actually, when Valve saw that people were making comparisons between Vince Offer and the Scout, they added a few extra Scout lines referencing Vince's commercials. Specifically "No other class gonna do that!" "If you order now, I'll throw in a second beating, absolutely free." and "Look at this. Just caved in your skull, my bat's still dry. No clumps of hair, nothing."
